examples: Observance of the law is a matter of principle for us.
County governments should use their powers to ensure strict observance of laws.
The word religion is derived from the Latin noun religio, which denotes both earnest observance of ritual obligations and an inward spirit of reverence.
To be sure, it's a tradition more honored in the breach than the observance.
Scottish Borders Council's education committee passed its new guidelines on religious observance earlier this week.
